## Executive Summary

This report documents all materials explored to create the tianqi agent persona. Tianqi Chen is a pioneering researcher in ML systems, creator of foundational open-source infrastructure including XGBoost, Apache TVM, and MLC-LLM. He is an Assistant Professor at CMU and Distinguished Engineer at NVIDIA.
